locale.name: English
layout.mainHeroTitle: One identity for every NetMetric product.
layout.mainHeroDescription: Manage CRM, ERP, Account, and Tools with a centralized, secure, workspace-oriented identity platform.
layout.bullet.mfa: MFA, session controls, and secure token flows
layout.bullet.unified: Shared account and access model across products
error.unexpectedDescription: Please try again. If the issue continues, contact support.
error.criticalDescription: The application encountered an unexpected error.
error.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for has moved or no longer exists.
auth.login.pageDescription: Access every product securely with your NetMetric account.
auth.login.cardDescription: Use one identity for CRM, ERP, Account, and Tools.
auth.register.pageDescription: Create your central account for NetMetric products.
auth.register.cardDescription: Your first workspace is created automatically, and you can enable products after signup.
auth.forgot.pageDescription: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.forgot.cardDescription: A secure reset link will be sent to the email address tied to your account.
auth.reset.pageDescription: Use a strong and unique password for better security.
auth.reset.cardDescription: Create your new password using the information from the reset link.
auth.reset.backToLoginPrefix: To return to the sign in page
auth.confirm.pageDescription: Confirm your email address to securely activate your account.
auth.confirm.cardDescription: If you have a verification link, continue. Otherwise request a new verification email.
auth.mfa.pageDescription: Complete the second verification step to protect your account.
auth.mfa.cardDescription: Enter the one-time code from your authenticator app or code delivery channel.
auth.recovery.pageDescription: If you cannot access your authenticator, use one of your saved recovery codes.
auth.recovery.cardDescription: Enter your one-time recovery code for secure sign-in.
auth.workspace.pageDescription: Choose the NetMetric workspace you want to continue with.
auth.workspace.cardDescription: Continue with one of the workspaces you are authorized for.
form.fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form.
form.invalidVerificationLink: The verification link is missing or invalid.
form.enterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
field.acceptTerms: I accept the terms of use
success.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
success.passwordReset: Your password has been updated successfully.
success.emailConfirmed: Your email address has been confirmed successfully.
success.confirmationSent: If an account exists for this email, a confirmation link has been sent.
success.loginMfaRequired: Login verified. Please complete MFA to continue.
auth.error.default: The operation could not be completed. Please verify your details and try again.
auth.error.invalid_credentials: Email address or password is incorrect.
auth.error.email_not_confirmed: You need to confirm your email address to continue.
auth.error.mfa_required: Multi-factor authentication is required to continue.
auth.error.invalid_token: The token is invalid or expired.
auth.error.tenant_required: You must select a workspace to continue.
auth.error.access_denied: You are not authorized for this action.
auth.error.mfa_invalid: Code verification failed. Please try again.
auth.error.recovery_invalid: Recovery code verification failed. Please try again.
auth.error.registration_conflict: An account with these details already exists.
validation.password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.fullName.min: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.workspaceName.min: Workspace name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.acceptTerms.required: You must accept the terms of use to continue.
validation.code.min: Code must be at least 6 characters.
validation.recoveryCode.min: Recovery code must be at least 6 characters.

public.pages.about.description: Use one shared account, locale preference, and product language across every NetMetric frontend.
